basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has published the Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I position. Candidates with a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Mechanical, Production, Manufacturing, Civil, Electrical Engineering, or related disciplines, along with the prescribed GATE/CSIR-UGC NET or other national-level qualification (as applicable), are eligible to apply through email at the official website https://nitc.ac.in. The age limit has not been specified in the offici

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Mechanical/Production/Manufacturing Engineering or related with first class and GATE/CSIR-UGC NET, Bachelor's degree in Mechanical/Production/Civil/Electrical Engineering with CGPA 7.5 and national exam score, Master's degree for PA-I with first class, Bachelor's degree with CGPA 7.5 for PA-I
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I: Master's degree in Mechanical/Production/Manufacturing Engineering or related disciplines with first class and GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualified OR Bachelor's degree with first-class CGPA of 7.5 and valid national level exam score; For PA-I: Master's or Bachelor's with CGPA 7.5.

salary_details.details: JRF: Rs. 37,000+20% HRA per month PA-I: Rs. 30,000+20% HRA per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_calicut: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I

Master's degree in Mechanical/Production/Manufacturing Engineering or related with first class and GATE/CSIR-UGC NET, Bachelor's degree in Mechanical/Production/Civil/Electrical Engineering with CGPA 7.5 and national exam score, Master's degree for PA-I with first class, Bachelor's degree with CGPA 7.5 for PA-I

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I: Master's degree in Mechanical/Production/Manufacturing Engineering or related disciplines with first class and GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualified OR Bachelor's degree with first-class CGPA of 7.5 and valid national level exam score; For PA-I: Master's or Bachelor's with CGPA 7.5.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: JRF: Rs. 37,000+20% HRA per month PA-I: Rs. 30,000+20% HRA per month

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting your application via email is 07-07-2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position is Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA per month, and for the Project Associate I position, it is Rs. 30,000 + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree in Mechanical/Production/Manufacturing Engineering or related disciplines with first class and GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualification, or a Bachelor's degree with first-class CGPA of 7.5 and a valid national level exam score.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Interested candidates need to send their application along with required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the National Institute of Technology Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity. The duration of the contract will be as per the project requirements and institute norms.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
